events.content: Use dedicated PTY input websocket: Use dedicated PTY input websocket

raw.question: Use dedicated PTY input websocket
raw.reasoning: A separate /api/input/{name}/stream path isolates low-latency input from dashboard event replay, can reuse broker API-key auth, and lets the server preserve per-agent ordering by processing one frame at a time.

retrospective.summary: Added authenticated PTY input websocket stream and TypeScript SDK openInputStream helper with ordered acks, bounded buffering, docs, and tests.
